title: aquilegia vulgaris subsp. pyrenaica
intro: Aquilegia vulgaris subsp. pyrenaica, also known as the Pyrenean Columbine or Pyrenean Granny's Bonnet, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Aquilegia vulgaris subsp. pyrenaica include its potential to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be guided by a qualified healthcare professional.
